response.global_summary: The video is a concluding segment of the "hololive English 4th Concert - Serendipity", featuring a static image of the concert participants. The theme song "Serendipity" by Hololive English plays throughout the entire duration.

scenes.description: The video displays a static image of the hololive English 4th Concert - Serendipity promotional artwork. The text on screen announces that the sneak peek part of the show has ended and thanks the viewers. The official theme song of the concert, 'Serendipity', plays throughout the scene.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
The stars aligned like it was always meant to be
So come along and join me, embracing serendipity
One shooting star, one blaze of light
(One time in a lifetime)
One million wishes in the night
Somehow, my dearest dream came true
(One time in a lifetime)
I saw this brilliant sky with you!
So many roads, so many journeys
But luck decided that today, we'd meet
It's serendipity! (Ahh)
Mysterious, a single moment changes fate
The winds and tides that shaped our lives all led us to this day
It's wondrous, somehow we met along the way!
Now here you are beside me, embracing serendipity!
One time in a lifetime (That's right!)
One time in a lifetime
One time in a lifetime (That's right!)
One time in a lifetime
One magic moment that we share
(One time in a lifetime)
While music lingers in the air;
A song of everlasting bonds,
(One time in a lifetime)
To warm my heart as time goes on.
Each day will bring another journey,
With new encounters that are meant to be.
It's serendipity! (Ahh)
Miraculous, that we're together in this life;
A perfect dance of happenstance that brought us side by side
It's marvelous that though the universe is wide,
You're standing here beside me, embracing serendipity!
One time in a lifetime (That's right!)
One time in a lifetime
One time in a lifetime (That's right!)
One time in a lifetime
This is right where we're meant to be,
(Sweet, sweet serendipity!)
Wishing on stars and chasing after dreams,
Seeing where they lead
(Say it with me, everybody!)
Serendipity!
Mysterious, a single moment changes fate
The winds and tides that shaped our lives all led us to this day
It's wondrous, somehow we met along the way!
Now here you are beside me, embracing serendipity!
We'll shine like shooting stars in flight tonight
One time in a lifetime (That's right!)
One time in a lifetime

response.thoughts:
**Analyzing the Hololive English 4th Concert - Serendipity Preview**

Okay, so I've got this video of the Hololive English 4th Concert "Serendipity" preview. My task is to break it down. Right now, it's a static image with continuous music. Initially, I was thinking of it as a single scene, spanning the entire duration from 00:00.000 to 04:54.000, but I need to dive deeper into that music. The on-screen text "The sneak peak part of the show has ended. Thank you for watching." (and its Japanese equivalent) indicates this is a short promotional clip.

I've listened to the audio and noticed distinct sections within the track. I've broken them down as follows: first vocal part (00:00-00:46), an instrumental/transition section (00:46-01:23), a second vocal part (01:23-02:10), then a third vocal section (02:10-02:40), then a fourth vocal section (02:40-03:30), and an instrumental/outro (03:30-end). This could be a single song with variations, or perhaps a medley, which will be important to discern.

Now, I need to identify the music. I will leverage the information I have: the video title and context "hololive English 4th Concert Serendipity". I'll use a search strategy to pinpoint the song title or setlist. My plan is to search using the queries "hololive English 4th Concert Serendipity theme song" or "hololive English 4th Concert Serendipity setlist" to find the relevant information. I will then utilize the `web_search_langsearch_multi` to execute this search.

After the search, depending on the results, I'll structure the response. If the song(s) can be identified, I'll search for lyrics. If not, the lyrics fields will have to remain null. Let's get to it and find out what we're actually listening to!



**Analyzing the "Serendipity" Clip**

Okay, so I've got this video. It's playing "Serendipity" by Hololive English – I have the lyrics handy. But wait, let me check the details. The video is essentially a static scene with the music looping. Right, the *duration* is 4:54. Hmm, that's interesting. I know the original track. It's either an instrumental version, a different mix, or it could be the full track, but something about the runtime has me thinking. The metadata is all there: "Serendipity" by "Hololive English". The lyrics are available, I have everything I need, and now I can give a well-informed answer.
